name: Atlas Valley Golf Club
about: Atlas Valley Golf Club is a comprehensive golf and leisure facility in Grand Blanc, MI, featuring an 18-hole golf course and advanced TrackMan golf simulators. The venue offers a full-service experience with amenities including a pro shop, lessons, a bar and grill, swimming pool, and event spaces for weddings and banquets. It operates with a dual focus on on-course play and simulator technology, catering to both traditional golfers and those seeking indoor practice or entertainment options.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan simulator technology for accurate data and game analysis
On-course and indoor options for year-round play regardless of weather
Comprehensive amenities including pro shop, lessons, and dining facilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available at The Bar & Grill with a dinner menu
Bar and grill service available, no BYOB restrictions mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify club rental options, so bringing your own clubs is recommended unless otherwise arranged.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has its own bar and grill service available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing, but typical simulator rounds take 1.5-2 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue offers family-oriented amenities including a pool and various event spaces, making it suitable for families.
